title: Create: Designed Decor
description: **Designed Decor** is a lightweight Create mod add-on focused on decorative industrial-style blocks and items like cardboard sheets, safety gear, and sawdust crafting, made to fit seamlessly into Create 0.5-based modpacks.
body:
Thank you wonderful people who made this dream of being a modder a reality

Can we get 3k downloads before curseforge?

Designed Decor is a feature-focused add-on for the Create mod, built specifically for players and modpack makers who want rich decorative content without jumping to Create 0.6. This mod expands the creative possibilities of your factory and industrial builds by introducing a curated selection of themed blocks, items, and recipes that fit naturally into the Create 0.5.x ecosystem.

With Designed Decor, you can craft immersive industrial environments using new materials like cardboard sheets made from wood pulp, which in turn can be processed through Create’s machinery. Add realism to your factories with sawdust produced via milling logs, and use it in custom crafting chains. Want to add some safety aesthetics? Equip your workers with a bright orange safety vest—a purely cosmetic armor item that sells the look of a fully operational facility.

All new content is designed to integrate seamlessly with Create’s systems. Recipes use Create’s mechanics like milling and blasting, and each item is balanced to feel like it belongs in a survival playthrough—not just creative mode. Whether you’re running a logistics empire, building a warehouse, or creating an immersive modpack experience, Designed Decor fills in the stylistic and functional gaps with a lightweight, lore-friendly touch.

This mod was built with MCreator, but designed with care—not bloated, not overpowered, and fully compatible with most Create add-ons that stick to the 0.5 range. If you’re not ready to leap into Create 6.0 but still want something fresh, functional, and decorative—Designed Decor delivers.



https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=LVIy5-lBYvY
